title: Japanese Pagoda Lanterns
body:
**Japanese Pagoda Lanterns has very simple premise: Lanterns are Japanese now with little Pagoda style roofs.**

This is my second remodel/remake of this pack now and I'm really proud of it. I hope you like it.

**This pack also supports the following Mods:**
- [Jaden's Nether Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion)
- [The Endergetic Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/endergetic)
- [Caverns and Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms)

---
